description_long: This is a single bed with a sturdy wooden frame featuring prominent square posts at each corner. The bed is outfitted with an orange blanket adorned with a repeating white diamond pattern, neatly covering a white mattress. A matching orange pillow with the same diamond motif rests at the head of the bed. The headboard and footboard are both solid and angular, with the headboard slightly taller and more pronounced. The wood has a matte, natural finish, giving the bed a robust and utilitarian appearance. The bedding appears soft and inviting, contrasting with the hard, geometric lines of the frame.
description: A single wooden bed with a solid frame, orange diamond-patterned bedding, and matching pillow. The design is robust and utilitarian with a matte wood finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, the orange patterned blanket, and the pillow at the headboard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the headboard, centered pillow, and the symmetrical diamond pattern on the blanket.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blanket and pillow, with the footboard visible at the far end.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the footboard and the uninterrupted pattern of the blanket.
